_doc: Year-as-shares refix Step B (2026-05-31) — EMAN / Charles Dorfman 9592451. Two-column MAR Article 19 template: nested Price|Volume sub-table (single tranche, 67,649) with NO Date and NO director column; labelled '- Aggregated volume' = N/A so the parser SUMS the per-tranche volume; PDMR name from 'a) Name'; transaction date from the 'e) Date of the transaction' KV row (27 May 2026). Pre-fix the parser fell through to the legacy regex and stored shares=2026. Post-fix: ONE aggregated row, shares=67649, date 2026-05-27.
